name: Yogurt Primavera
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Reduced chicken broth (boil 2 cups down to 1)
6 oz Peas in the pod, shelled
2 oz Carrots, cut into 1/4 inch dice (approximately 1/2 cup)
2 oz Zucchini, cut into 1/4 inch dice (approximately 1/2 cup)
2 oz Golden squash, cut into 1/4 inch dice (1/2 cup)
2 oz Button mushrooms, cut into 1/4 inch slices (1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour 1/4 cup of the broth into a small bowl or cup, and stir in the cornstarch until dissolved. Set aside.
2. In a medium saucepan, bring the remaining broth to a boil over moderate heat. Add the vegetables and simmer until tender-crisp, about 3 minutes.
3. Stir in the broth-cornstarch mixture, the yogurt, Parmesan, and herbs, and simmer just until thick, 1 to 2 minutes.
4. Pour the sauce over cooked pasta. Season to taste with black pepper.
